rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARSHALL I WAIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Surviving Spouse And Income Beneficiary Lonna Wais Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings With Respect To Petitions For Instructions
rulings.Rulings: The tentative for the Motions for Judgment on the Pleadings may be found on the register of actions. Any party who contests the tentative and requests argument must notify counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on 10/31/12.
